title: The Last Rehearsal Bell
originalityStatement: An original single-room rehearsal benchmark created to test social and performance pacing without map replacement.

storyModel.premise: A new stagehand learns why two performers keep missing the same entrance by handling one cue, observing their reactions, and choosing when to ring the final rehearsal bell.
storyModel.playerRole: New stagehand who does not yet understand the performers' shared history
protectedCanon: The rehearsal remains in one unchanged room
Neither performer is deliberately sabotaging the other
The shared history is revealed only after the player has handled the cue and observed both reactions

productProfile.spatialBudget: one unchanged rehearsal room with no topology or map-layer variants
